headline: Wall Street Analysts Think FactSet (FDS) Could Surge 38.8%: Read This Before Placing a Bet
summary: The mean of analysts' price targets for FactSet (FDS) points to a 38.8% upside in the stock. While this highly sought-after metric has not proven reasonably effective, strong agreement among analysts in raising earnings estimates does indicate an upside in the stock.
